free_text: Issue 4
Engl.translation of ZET,42,988,1962
Exp. details
Engl.translation of ZET,40,1270
Energy dependence of cross sections for (n,gamma)
reactions on a number of odd-z nuclei.
Slowing-down in lead.
E - energy in keV, t- time in microsec .
SIG(n,gamma)=k*(Jgamma(t)/Jboron(t))*(t+0.3),
Jgamma - counting rate of prompt capture gamma rays,
Jboron - counting rate for boron counter,
k - calibration factor, determined from areas of
known resonances.
Of compiler M.M. Source of data is not clear- from
authors or digitized from figures.
Statistical error.
Error of corrections,which were not made.
Total error < 10% for E<10 keV,
< 15.% for E>10 keV.
Converted from ENTRY 80246
M.M. Ref. J,JET,13,895,1961 was added and
moved in REL-REF. COMMENT was added.
Upper -> lower case correction.
Dates were corrected for 4-digits year.
bib Information was added .
